rows.notes: Top-of-page title/header in Latin/old script. Several letters unclear (e.g. 'Arrearaja' vs 'Arrearages'), but clearly a page header with no amounts; alignment with amount columns absent.
Clear entry text 'Gwinear Rect. pro Dim. Ann' and amounts aligned strongly in the pounds column: 30 pounds, 0s, 0d. Column boundaries unambiguous.

Name and occupation clear. Amount reads cleanly as '7 0 0' in the three rightmost columns; vertical alignment unambiguous.
Short name 'Prickett' with an amount column entry aligned with previous line. Handwriting slightly less distinct than previous but numbers read as '7 0 0'.
